items.title: S01E01 - Birthday Presence
items.summary: Brian and Ross come to an understanding while trying to persuade a divorced father to attend his son's birthday party.

infolabels.title: Birthday Presence
infolabels.plot: Brian and Ross come to an understanding while trying to persuade a divorced father to attend his son's birthday party.

items.title: S01E02 - How to Succeed in Day Care
items.summary: Brian and Kate are at odds and evens when the parents of overachiever Molly ask them to add math and reading to their curriculum.

infolabels.title: How to Succeed in Day Care
infolabels.plot: Brian and Kate are at odds and evens when the parents of overachiever Molly ask them to add math and reading to their curriculum.

items.title: S01E03 - One Big Happy Family
items.summary: Self-sufficient teen Ross looks at quality time as an overrated inconvenience, while Brian is serious about getting to know his son.

infolabels.title: One Big Happy Family
infolabels.plot: Self-sufficient teen Ross looks at quality time as an overrated inconvenience, while Brian is serious about getting to know his son.

items.title: S01E04 - That Saturday Feeling
items.summary: Brian takes the title of ""Hippest Dad"" to heart, when all Ross would like him to be is ""Anonymous Ride Giver,"" especially when his dad's new found coolness threatens to ruin his party.

infolabels.title: That Saturday Feeling
infolabels.plot: Brian takes the title of ""Hippest Dad"" to heart, when all Ross would like him to be is ""Anonymous Ride Giver,"" especially when his dad's new found coolness threatens to ruin his party.

items.title: S01E05 - Community Service
items.summary: Caught in a stock scam, Eileen receives a sentence worse than death: community service at the day-care center. Meanwhile, Ross's bathrobe, Baby, seems to have escaped from his custody.

infolabels.title: Community Service
infolabels.plot: Caught in a stock scam, Eileen receives a sentence worse than death: community service at the day-care center. Meanwhile, Ross's bathrobe, Baby, seems to have escaped from his custody.

items.title: S01E06 - Birth Wait
items.summary: Brian and Kate have their hands full at a slumber party with a guitar-strumming Ross, Eileen, two hyper kids, and another kid who's dreading the arrival of a new sibling.

infolabels.title: Birth Wait
infolabels.plot: Brian and Kate have their hands full at a slumber party with a guitar-strumming Ross, Eileen, two hyper kids, and another kid who's dreading the arrival of a new sibling.

items.title: S01E07 - What I Did for Love
items.summary: When Kristin turns down his request for a date, Ross and his overactive teen hormones settle for an evening of team babysitting.

infolabels.title: What I Did for Love
infolabels.plot: When Kristin turns down his request for a date, Ross and his overactive teen hormones settle for an evening of team babysitting.

items.title: S01E08 - Great Expectations
items.summary: Buoyed by Ross's high aptitude scores, Kate goes to work as his high-pressure tutor.

infolabels.title: Great Expectations
infolabels.plot: Buoyed by Ross's high aptitude scores, Kate goes to work as his high-pressure tutor.

items.title: S01E09 - How Now, Dow Jones
items.summary: Kate turns bearish when Brian becomes more interested in part-time stock counseling than in full-time storytelling.

infolabels.title: How Now, Dow Jones
infolabels.plot: Kate turns bearish when Brian becomes more interested in part-time stock counseling than in full-time storytelling.

items.title: S01E10 - Life at a Glance
items.summary: Obsessive planner Eileen meets a divorced father and, after dating him for only a week, she maps out their next 50 years together.

infolabels.title: Life at a Glance
infolabels.plot: Obsessive planner Eileen meets a divorced father and, after dating him for only a week, she maps out their next 50 years together.

items.title: S01E11 - The Age of Dinosaurs
items.summary: Ross basks in the glow of pre-school as he wows the kids with a hit dinosaur demo, prompting Brian and Kate to steer him toward a teaching career.

infolabels.title: The Age of Dinosaurs
infolabels.plot: Ross basks in the glow of pre-school as he wows the kids with a hit dinosaur demo, prompting Brian and Kate to steer him toward a teaching career.

items.title: S01E12 - Do You Think I'm Sexy?
items.summary: Aided by amateur counselors Elaine and Kristin, Kate tries to rekindle the romance in her marriage, as hamsters and finger painting replace dining and dancing.

infolabels.title: Do You Think I'm Sexy?
infolabels.plot: Aided by amateur counselors Elaine and Kristin, Kate tries to rekindle the romance in her marriage, as hamsters and finger painting replace dining and dancing.

items.title: S01E13 - The Field Trip
items.summary: The kids are gearing up for a trip to the petting zoo, but Kate's ego is what needs stroking after a bad day has her convinced that she's a day-care disaster.

infolabels.title: The Field Trip
infolabels.plot: The kids are gearing up for a trip to the petting zoo, but Kate's ego is what needs stroking after a bad day has her convinced that she's a day-care disaster.

items.title: S02E01 - My World and Welcome to It
items.summary: Eileen gives Ross a student internship, but will the pressure of being a successful pre-stockbroker drive him into early retirement?

infolabels.title: My World and Welcome to It
infolabels.plot: Eileen gives Ross a student internship, but will the pressure of being a successful pre-stockbroker drive him into early retirement?

items.title: S02E02 - Won't You Be My Neighbor?
items.summary: The intimitable Eileen is moving next door, and it's not a pretty sight as she demoralizes the remodeling men and, in a pinch, babysits Emily.

infolabels.title: Won't You Be My Neighbor?
infolabels.plot: The intimitable Eileen is moving next door, and it's not a pretty sight as she demoralizes the remodeling men and, in a pinch, babysits Emily.

items.title: S02E03 - Trading Places
items.summary: Brian welcomes college buddy Steven Keaton whose plan to see St. Louis with son Andy falls on its arches when Andy decides he'd rather spend time at the playschool.

infolabels.title: Trading Places
infolabels.plot: Brian welcomes college buddy Steven Keaton whose plan to see St. Louis with son Andy falls on its arches when Andy decides he'd rather spend time at the playschool.

items.title: S02E04 - Girl Wars
items.summary: Ross finally gets up the nerve to ask a girl to a dance, but best friend Stiv has the nerve to ask her first.

infolabels.title: Girl Wars
infolabels.plot: Ross finally gets up the nerve to ask a girl to a dance, but best friend Stiv has the nerve to ask her first.

items.title: S02E05 - Harper and Son
items.summary: Brian's gregarious father visits, but he strikes out with Brian when he tries to turn Ross from a star sleeper into a star athlete.

infolabels.title: Harper and Son
infolabels.plot: Brian's gregarious father visits, but he strikes out with Brian when he tries to turn Ross from a star sleeper into a star athlete.

items.title: S02E06 - Merry Kristin
items.summary: Kristin gets her feelings hurt when she throws the Harper's her family's traditional Danish Eve of Christmas Eve feast. Later, the preschool throws a Christmas pageant.

infolabels.title: Merry Kristin
infolabels.plot: Kristin gets her feelings hurt when she throws the Harper's her family's traditional Danish Eve of Christmas Eve feast. Later, the preschool throws a Christmas pageant.

items.title: S02E07 - You Gotta Be a Football Hero
items.summary: Ross goes out for football to make a pass at a girl who loves the sport, and Brian is carried back to his gridiron glory days.

infolabels.title: You Gotta Be a Football Hero
infolabels.plot: Ross goes out for football to make a pass at a girl who loves the sport, and Brian is carried back to his gridiron glory days.

items.title: S02E08 - Smart Women, Nice Refreshments
items.summary: Eileen ropes a reluctant Kate into joining a professional women's group, but before long, Kate ""the Organizer"" has tied down the lead over Eileen in the race for club secretary.

infolabels.title: Smart Women, Nice Refreshments
infolabels.plot: Eileen ropes a reluctant Kate into joining a professional women's group, but before long, Kate ""the Organizer"" has tied down the lead over Eileen in the race for club secretary.

items.title: S02E09 - Out for a Stretch
items.summary: Ross takes a job baby-sitting, but an evening out cruising in a stretch limo is too tempting to turn down, so he takes Molly and Emily along for the ride.

infolabels.title: Out for a Stretch
infolabels.plot: Ross takes a job baby-sitting, but an evening out cruising in a stretch limo is too tempting to turn down, so he takes Molly and Emily along for the ride.

items.title: S02E10 - The Music Man
items.summary: The preschool's music teacher, Charlie the Song Guy, strikes a chord with Eileen, who learns to enjoy sounds other then the ringing of a cash register.

infolabels.title: The Music Man
infolabels.plot: The preschool's music teacher, Charlie the Song Guy, strikes a chord with Eileen, who learns to enjoy sounds other then the ringing of a cash register.

items.title: S02E11 - A Very Brady Episode
items.summary: After getting an F on a term paper, Ross' parents are very disappointed in his efforts. They asked what he was doing with his time & he's watching a Brady Bunch marathon. So they ground him from the tv until he can improve his grades.

infolabels.title: A Very Brady Episode
infolabels.plot: After getting an F on a term paper, Ross' parents are very disappointed in his efforts. They asked what he was doing with his time & he's watching a Brady Bunch marathon. So they ground him from the tv until he can improve his grades.

items.title: S02E12 - My Momma Done Tol' Me
items.summary: Ross battles Kate's low opinion of his new girlfriend, who has a very high opinion of herself.

infolabels.title: My Momma Done Tol' Me
infolabels.plot: Ross battles Kate's low opinion of his new girlfriend, who has a very high opinion of herself.

items.title: S02E13 - Fraternity
items.summary: While Ross admires Brian's practical joking fraternity brother Stan, Brian thinks Stan still has some growing up to do.

infolabels.title: Fraternity
infolabels.plot: While Ross admires Brian's practical joking fraternity brother Stan, Brian thinks Stan still has some growing up to do.

items.title: S02E14 - Tears of a Clown
items.summary: Ross and Stiv enroll in home ec to savor the presence of their female classmates, but Ross finds his cooking teacher's company most appetizing.

infolabels.title: Tears of a Clown
infolabels.plot: Ross and Stiv enroll in home ec to savor the presence of their female classmates, but Ross finds his cooking teacher's company most appetizing.

items.title: S02E15 - Harmless Harper
items.summary: Brian is flustered but flattered by the amorous attention of an attractive stockbroke, but Kate invests her complete trust in her husband.

infolabels.title: Harmless Harper
infolabels.plot: Brian is flustered but flattered by the amorous attention of an attractive stockbroke, but Kate invests her complete trust in her husband.

items.title: S02E16 - Three Men and a Babe
items.summary: Ross loses big with his buddies when he begins spending all of his time in artistic pursuits with his girlfriend, instead of joining the guys for their manly game of Risk.

infolabels.title: Three Men and a Babe
infolabels.plot: Ross loses big with his buddies when he begins spending all of his time in artistic pursuits with his girlfriend, instead of joining the guys for their manly game of Risk.

items.title: S02E17 - Foul Play
items.summary: Eileen figures to benefit when her ""best friend"" Kristin begins going out with Eileen's grateful boss.

infolabels.title: Foul Play
infolabels.plot: Eileen figures to benefit when her ""best friend"" Kristin begins going out with Eileen's grateful boss.

items.title: S02E18 - The Reunion
items.summary: Eileen is determind to relive the humiliating days of yesteryear at her high-school reunion, so she hires Ross to pose as her husband.

infolabels.title: The Reunion
infolabels.plot: Eileen is determind to relive the humiliating days of yesteryear at her high-school reunion, so she hires Ross to pose as her husband.

items.title: S02E19 - The Lost Weekend
items.summary: Ross and his girlfriend have the house to themselves or so they think.

infolabels.title: The Lost Weekend
infolabels.plot: Ross and his girlfriend have the house to themselves or so they think.

items.title: S02E20 - Father Knows Best
items.summary: An overprotective dad pulls his son out of preschool, while Ross is pushed into a date with the daughter of one of Eileen's clients.

infolabels.title: Father Knows Best
infolabels.plot: An overprotective dad pulls his son out of preschool, while Ross is pushed into a date with the daughter of one of Eileen's clients.
